sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60868" key="kuniste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῠν-ιστέον</orth>, <sense id="n60868.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must practise Cynic philosophy</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2003.tlg001:7:204a" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.204a</biblScope> </bibl> tit.</sense> </entryFree>
